ddls:
CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the series started airing */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the series ended airing (if applicable) */,
  "total_seasons" INTEGER /* Total number of seasons in the series */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the series */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the series (e.g., airing, completed, canceled) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the series */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the series */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_agencies" (
  "rating_agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating agency */,
  "rating_agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the episode file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., video, audio, subtitle) */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format of the file */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution of the file */,
  "audio_codec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio codec of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_files_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_files_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_files_audio_codec_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_codec_id") REFERENCES audio_codecs ("audio_codec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_codecs" (
  "audio_codec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio codec */,
  "audio_codec_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio codec */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_codec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_image_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_type_id") REFERENCES image_types ("image_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "image_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image type */,
  "image_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the image type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the episode */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who accessed the episode */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* Referrer URL of the user who accessed the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
